title: Live Nation Entertainment 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary annual-report source for Live Nation's segments, venues, fan counts, ticket volume, revenue, profitability, debt, and NYSE listing context.

title: Live Nation Market Capitalization
note: Point-in-time market-cap source for the June 2026 registry refresh.

title: Live Nation P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for the approximate negative TTM P/E ratio used as a volatile valuation snapshot.

title: Ticketmaster Business
note: Product source for Ticketmaster's event creation, ticket sales, event-day, marketing, API, and partner capabilities.

title: Live Nation Live Events, Concert Tickets, Tour News, Venues
note: Product source for Live Nation's fan-facing concert, festival, venue, ticket, livestream, VIP, and network surfaces.

title: Justice Department Sues Live Nation-Ticketmaster for Monopolizing Markets Across the Live Concert Industry
note: Government antitrust source describing alleged monopolization, exclusive ticketing contracts, venue leverage, and the integrated Live Nation-Ticketmaster flywheel.

title: FTC Sues Live Nation and Ticketmaster for Engaging in Illegal Ticket Resale Tactics and Deceiving Artists and Consumers about Price and Ticket Limits
note: Government consumer-protection source for alleged resale, ticket-limit, broker, fee, and pricing issues relevant to ticketing disruption concepts.

title: pretix Ticketing Software
note: Product source for pretix ticket-shop, payment, access-control, point-of-sale, concert, festival, and event-ticketing capabilities.

title: pretix GitHub Repository
note: Open-source source for pretix stability, use cases, repository status, and license context.

title: Mobilizon Event Platform
note: Open-source federated event and group-management source for decentralized event discovery and community coordination.

title: ActivityPub W3C Recommendation
note: Technical source for decentralized social networking, client-to-server APIs, and server-to-server federation used in event discovery concepts.

title: Lightning Network Overview
note: Technical source for instant, low-cost Bitcoin payment channels used in resale settlement and fan-backed guarantee concepts.

title: Verifiable Credentials Data Model v2.0
note: Technical source for issuer-holder-verifier credential flows, tamper-evident claims, and signed digital ticket concepts.
